name: PiQrypt MCP Server
description: Cryptographic audit trail for AI agents via Model Context Protocol. Every AI decision signed Ed25519, hash-chained, tamper-proof. AISS-1.0 compliant. Post-quantum ready.

tools.name: piqrypt_stamp_event
tools.description: Sign an AI decision with Ed25519 cryptographic proof. Returns a hash-chained, tamper-proof event conforming to AISS-1.0.

tools.name: piqrypt_verify_chain
tools.description: Verify the cryptographic integrity of an event chain. Returns chain_valid: true/false with detailed error report.

tools.name: piqrypt_export_audit
tools.description: Export the full audit trail for compliance. Supports JSON and .pqz certified archive formats (SEC, FINRA, GDPR, HIPAA).

tools.name: piqrypt_search_events
tools.description: Search the agent's event history via SQLite index. Filter by event type, time range, or agent ID.
